chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-1220 of 2022 Riaz Ahmed Rind & others Versus The Registrar Sindh Cooperative Society & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of CMA 17668/22 2. For hearing of CMA 5502/22 3. For hearing of main case. Dated: 30.09.2025 Mirza Sarfaraz Ahmed, advocate for petitioners. Mr. Kafeel Ahmed Abbasi, Addl. A.G. -.-.- Learned counsel for the petitioners, on instructions, does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. Judge Judge
